message:
fix(export): prevent silent file overwrites in detail-modal HTML/Markdown exports

Export flows in the detail modal previously used generate_filename()
directly, which could silently overwrite existing files in the
downloads directory if the same session was exported multiple times
or filenames collided.

Wire unique_filename() from html_export into both HTML and Markdown
export paths to append numeric suffixes (-1, -2, etc.) when a file
already exists. Refactor export task dispatch to accept a single
pre-deduped output_path instead of separate output_dir + output_filename,
making the deduplication point explicit and preventing any code path
from bypassing it.

Add write_export_bytes_no_overwrite helper for atomic write-without-
clobber semantics. Update beads issue tracker with the data-loss
prevention task.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
